name: Sofia Isella
description: '''Sofia Isella Miranda''' (born January 29, 2005), known professionally as '''Sofia Isella''' (stylized in [[all caps]]), is an American singer-songwriter and music producer. She has written three [[extended play|EPs]], releasing the first in 2020 and the next two in 2024 and 2025, with another to be released in April 2026. After gaining popularity on [[TikTok]], she performed opening acts for [[Melanie Martinez]], [[Tom Odell]], [[Taylor Swift]], [[Florence and the Machine]], and [[Glass Animals]] concerts in 2023, 2024, and 2025. Isella's work contains elements of [[alternative pop|alternative]], [[indie pop|indie]], and [[dark pop]] music and frequently focuses on themes of [[women's empowerment]].
